summary: Iteration 11: Tested InkBook landing page redesign - transparent dark navbar, MacBook mockups in feature sections, and desktop screenshots without 'Made with Emergent' watermark inside device screens.
critical_code_review_comments: The platform-level 'Made with Emergent' badge (bottom-right of page) is still visible - this is the Emergent platform overlay and is NOT inside device mockups, which is acceptable per requirements
context_for_next_testing_agent: All landing page changes from iteration 11 verified working: (1) LandingNav is transparent at top (rgba(0,0,0,0)) and transitions to dark glass (rgba(7,7,7,0.77) + blur) after scroll >55px. (2) Feature sections 1-3 use MacBook components with desktop.jpg, desktop-booking.jpg, desktop-chat.jpg respectively (NOT iPhones). (3) All 6 screenshot images return HTTP 200. (4) Hero has 1 MacBook + 3 iPhones. (5) Stats section shows 500+/10k+/4.9★. (6) Footer is correct.

test_results.navbar_links: PASS - Studios finden, KI-Stilberater, Anmelden, Registrieren
